_meta.name: sidebar-creatio
_meta.description_es: Sidebar navegación estilo Creatio (fondo navy oscuro, acento azul, sección admin oculta por rol). Compatible con Next.js App Router. Soporta role-based sections y data-testid en logout.
_meta.description_en: Creatio-style navigation sidebar (dark navy background, blue accent, admin section hidden by role). Compatible with Next.js App Router. Supports role-based sections and data-testid on logout.
_meta.stack: Next.js 14 App Router + Tailwind CSS + lucide-react

props.role: string | undefined — if 'admin', shows admin section
props.navItems: { href, label, icon }[] — main navigation items
props.adminItems: { href, label, icon }[] — admin-only navigation items
props.appName: string — app name shown in header

usage_en: Same as above. onLogout callback is called before redirect to /login.
